heading: Omitted
label: 485 Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, , , which authorized Cheyenne River Sioux Tribe and Standing Rock Sioux Tribe to pay assignment holders moneys collected for use of subsurface rights, was omitted from the Code as being of special and not general application.act July 14, 1954, ch. 472, § 268 Stat. 468
